hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】由于PPI飙升加剧了加息担忧，比特币接近关键支撑位：分析师；【CRYPTO】Immunefi 将在关闭决定后吸收 Code4rena 错误赏金客户；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席。

items.title: Bitcoin pinned near critical support as hot PPI spike compounds rate hike fears: analysts
items.summary: Bitcoin floats around $80,000 after April core PPI surges 1% MoM — hottest since 2022 — as crypto ETFs bleed and rate-hike odds climb.
items.title_zh: 由于PPI飙升加剧了加息担忧，比特币接近关键支撑位：分析师
items.summary_zh: 随着加密 ETF 的流失和加息可能性的攀升，4 月份核心 PPI 环比飙升 1%（自 2022 年以来最热）后，比特币浮动在 80,000 美元左右。

items.title: Immunefi to absorb Code4rena bug bounty customers after shutdown decision
items.summary: Immunefi said it will help migrate Code4rena’s bounty programs, rewards and researchers onto its platform.
items.title_zh: Immunefi 将在关闭决定后吸收 Code4rena 错误赏金客户
items.summary_zh: Immunefi 表示，它将帮助将 Code4rena 的赏金计划、奖励和研究人员迁移到其平台上。

items.title: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair
items.summary: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席
items.summary_zh: 在有史以来最具争议性的美联储主席投票中，56 岁的沃什获得确认接替杰罗姆·鲍威尔 (Jerome Powell)。

items.title: Traders believe inflation could near 5% this year
items.summary: Prediction market traders see two-in-three odds that inflation will go above 4.5% this year, and nearly 40% odds that prices will accelerate above 5%.
items.title_zh: 交易员认为今年通胀率可能接近 5%
items.summary_zh: 预测市场交易者认为今年通胀率将超过 4.5% 的可能性为三分之二，而物价将加速超过 5% 的可能性接近 40%。

items.title: Israeli strikes on cars in southern Lebanon kill 12, health ministry says
items.summary: Two children are among those reported dead after seven cars were struck in separate attacks south of Beirut.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩卫生部称以色列对黎巴嫩南部汽车的袭击造成 12 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据报道，贝鲁特以南七辆汽车被撞，造成两名儿童死亡。

items.title: Deadly Russian drone attacks on Ukraine resume after ceasefire expires
items.summary: Six people have been killed after Zelensky warned of "more waves" of Russian strikes through Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 停火到期后俄罗斯无人机再次对乌克兰发动致命袭击
items.summary_zh: 泽伦斯基警告称，周三俄罗斯将发动“更多波”袭击，导致六人死亡。

items.title: Gulf Countries Arrest Shiite ‘Traitors’ Amid War With Iran
items.summary: Dozens of Gulf citizens have been accused of belonging to Iran-linked terrorism cells as the war accelerates a shift toward deeper authoritarianism in the region.
items.title_zh: 海湾国家在与伊朗的战争中逮捕什叶派“叛徒”
items.summary_zh: 随着战争加速该地区向更深层次的威权主义转变，数十名海湾公民被指控属于与伊朗有关的恐怖主义组织。

items.title: Trump Is in China as Iran War Continues With No End in Sight
items.summary: Before leaving Washington on Tuesday, the president reiterated threats to decimate Iran if it doesn’t agree to a deal to resolve the conflict.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争持续且看不到结束之际，特朗普正在中国
items.summary_zh: 在周二离开华盛顿之前，总统重申，如果伊朗不同意达成解决冲突的协议，他将摧毁伊朗。

items.title: Senate votes to confirm Trump-pick Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed Chair
items.summary: On Wednesday, the Senate voted to confirm President Donald Trump's pick for Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh.
items.title_zh: 参议院投票确认特朗普提名凯文·沃什接替杰罗姆·鲍威尔担任美联储主席
items.summary_zh: 周三，参议院投票确认了唐纳德·特朗普总统对美联储主席凯文·沃什的人选。

items.title: Ethereum app builder Consensys has delayed its potential IPO until fall
items.summary: The MetaMask wallet builder had reportedly engaged bankers from JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs to lead the process.
items.title_zh: 以太坊应用程序构建商 Consensys 已将其潜在的 IPO 推迟到秋季
items.summary_zh: 据报道，MetaMask 钱包制造商聘请了摩根大通和高盛的银行家来领导这一过程。

items.title: Bitcoin buyers with long-term 'conviction' surges 300% with most recent buyers sitting on profits
items.summary: Bitcoin held by so-called conviction buyers has surged to nearly 4 million BTC, a roughly 300% increase since late 2025.
items.title_zh: 具有长期“信念”的比特币买家激增 300%，最近的买家都坐拥利润
items.summary_zh: 所谓的坚定买家持有的比特币已飙升至近 400 万比特币，自 2025 年底以来增加了约 300%。

items.title: Anchorage and Mexican billionaire’s Grupo Salinas ink cross-border payments partnership
items.summary: Grupo Salinas is set to integrate Anchorage Digital's stablecoin infrastructure into its cross-border payment flows.
items.title_zh: 安克雷奇与墨西哥亿万富翁 Grupo Salinas 签署跨境支付合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: Grupo Salinas 计划将 Anchorage Digital 的稳定币基础设施整合到其跨境支付流程中。

items.title: Strategy’s STRC may be fueling recurring mid-month bitcoin rallies, K33 says
items.summary: March and April saw strong bitcoin returns during the middle of the month, a pattern K33 suggests is linked to Strategy's STRC.
items.title_zh: K33 表示，Strategy 的 STRC 可能会推动比特币月中反复上涨
items.summary_zh: 3 月和 4 月中旬，比特币出现强劲回报，K33 认为这种模式与 Strategy 的 STRC 相关。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Trump in China: Traders predict a tariff truce extension and Boeing aircraft purchases
items.summary: Traders also think it is likely that the president will talk about Iran, despite his comments that the U.S. doesn't need China's help in resolving the war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在中国：交易员预测关税休战将延长并购买波音飞机
items.summary_zh: 交易员还认为，总统很可能会谈论伊朗问题，尽管他表示美国不需要中国帮助解决战争。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
items.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.
items.title_zh: 由于损失不断增加，摩根大通领导的银行集团限制了陷入困境的 KKR 私人信贷基金的信贷额度
items.summary_zh: KKR 基金（通常以其股票代码 FSK 提及）已成为私人信贷故事中最明显的断层线之一。

items.title: Russia-Ukraine War Shows Cease-Fires Have Lost Meaning Under Trump
items.summary: Temporary truces have become a tool of performative diplomacy, an end in themselves rather than a prelude to a lasting settlement, analysts say.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯-乌克兰战争表明，特朗普领导下的停火已失去意义
items.summary_zh: 分析人士表示，临时休战已成为表演外交的工具，其本身就是目的，而不是持久解决方案的前奏。

items.title: King’s Speech Comes at an Awkward Time for Starmer
items.summary: King Charles III read out Keir Starmer’s legislative agenda in the traditional manner, even as the British prime minister’s leadership remained under pressure.
items.title_zh: 国王的演讲是在斯塔默的尴尬时刻发表的
items.summary_zh: 尽管英国首相的领导层仍面临压力，查理三世还是以传统方式宣读了凯尔·斯塔默的立法议程。

items.title: Jupiter taps Bitwise to curate institutional-grade Solana-based USDe lending market
items.summary: Jupiter Lend, together with Fluid and Bitwise, will provide an avenue to earn yield on the USDe synthetic stablecoin.
items.title_zh: Jupiter 利用 Bitwise 来管理基于 Solana 的机构级 USDe 借贷市场
items.summary_zh: Jupiter Lend 与 Fluid 和 Bitwise 一起，将提供一种赚取 USDe 合成稳定币收益的途径。

items.title: More than 100 amendments filed targeting stablecoins, ethics and DeFi ahead of Senate Banking Committee Clarity Act vote
items.summary: U.S. Senate Banking Committee is scheduled to hold a markup on Thursday to amend and vote on the Clarity Act.
items.title_zh: 在参议院银行委员会《清晰法案》投票之前，针对稳定币、道德和 DeFi 提出了 100 多项修正案
items.summary_zh: 美国参议院银行委员会定于周四举行加价，对《澄清法案》进行修订和投票。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#670。

items.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
items.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.
items.title_zh: 参数高尔夫教会了我们关于人工智能辅助研究的哪些知识
items.summary_zh: Parameter Golf 汇聚了 1,000 多名参与者和 2,000 多份提交材料，在严格约束下探索人工智能辅助机器学习研究、编码代理、量化和新颖模型设计。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
items.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率如何在 2026 年初扩大
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率在 2026 年第一季度激增，其中 35 岁以上的用户增长最快，性别使用更加平衡，这表明主流 AI 的采用更加广泛。

items.title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
items.summary: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption.
items.title_zh: 在 OpenAI 上安全运行 Codex
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何通过沙箱、审批、网络策略和代理本机遥测技术安全地运行 Codex，以支持安全且合规的编码代理采用。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.summary: Also: LayerZero apology, Ronin layer-2 transition and ‘Clear Signing’
items.title_zh: 协议：Solana 的“Alpenglow”升级正在进行测试
items.summary_zh: 另外：LayerZero 道歉、Ronin Layer-2 过渡和“清晰签名”

items.title: Metaplanet delays preferred share listing amid challenging Japanese market structure
items.summary: CEO Simon Gerovich says regulatory and infrastructure challenges are slowing the launch of Metaplanet's perpetual preferred share.
items.title_zh: 日本市场结构充满挑战，Metaplanet 推迟优先股上市
items.summary_zh: 首席执行官 Simon Gerovich 表示，监管和基础设施方面的挑战正在减缓 Metaplanet 永久优先股的发行速度。

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: Bitcoin vs. gold: 26% relative undervaluation
items.summary: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Dovile Silenskyte provides an alternative to the “bitcoin as a risk asset” narrative. Then, Joshua de Vos shares insights and analysis on global exchanges.
items.title_zh: 加密多空：比特币与黄金：相对低估 26%
items.summary_zh: 在本周的加密多空时事通讯中，Dovile Silenskyte 提供了“比特币作为风险资产”叙述的替代方案。然后，Joshua de Vos 分享了对全球交易所的见解和分析。

items.title: Animoca-backed NUVA connects Figure's $19 billion of tokenized assets to Ethereum
items.summary: The protocol, led by veteran BNY executive Anthony Moro, aims to connect real-world assets with DeFi markets, starting with home equity lines of credit and Treasuries.
items.title_zh: Animoca 支持的 NUVA 将 Figure 190 亿美元的代币化资产连接到以太坊
items.summary_zh: 该协议由纽约银行资深高管 Anthony Moro 领导，旨在将现实世界资产与 DeFi 市场连接起来，从房屋净值信贷额度和国债开始。

items.title: Ethereum closes gap with Solana as DEX volumes converge near $45 billion
items.summary: The current near-parity gives both chains another chance to position themselves to capture volume when onchain activity rotates back.
items.title_zh: 随着 DEX 交易量接近 450 亿美元，以太坊缩小了与 Solana 的差距
items.summary_zh: 当前的接近平价为两条链提供了另一个机会，以便在链上活动恢复时捕获交易量。

items.title: Metaplanet posts $725 million Q1 net loss as bitcoin markdowns outweigh operating gains
items.summary: Metaplanet posted a $725.6 million net loss driven by bitcoin mark-to-market valuation markdowns even as operating profit rose 283%.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 第一季度净亏损 7.25 亿美元，因比特币降价超过运营收益
items.summary_zh: 尽管营业利润增长了 283%，但由于比特币按市值计价的估值下降，Metaplanet 仍录得 7.256 亿美元的净亏损。

items.title: How finance teams use Codex
items.summary: See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 财务团队如何使用 Codex

items.title: How NVIDIA engineers and researchers build with Codex
items.summary: Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems and turn research ideas into runnable experiments.
items.title_zh: NVIDIA 工程师和研究人员如何使用 Codex 进行构建
items.summary_zh: 团队使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来交付生产系统，并将研究想法转化为可运行的实验。

items.title: OpenAI launches DeployCo to help businesses build around intelligence
items.summary: OpenAI launches DeployCo, a new enterprise deployment company built to help organizations bring frontier AI into production and turn it into measurable business impact.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 DeployCo，帮助企业围绕智能进行构建
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 DeployCo，这是一家新的企业部署公司，旨在帮助组织将前沿人工智能投入生产并将其转化为可衡量的业务影响。

items.title_zh: 新的人工智能驱动的谷歌财经正在扩展到欧洲。

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: Jensen Huang joins Trump's China trip after the U.S. president called the Nvidia CEO
items.summary: The U.S. chipmaker executive was not included in earlier lists of business leaders participating in President Donald Trump's trip to China this week.
items.title_zh: 在美国总统致电英伟达首席执行官后，黄仁勋参加了特朗普的中国之行
items.summary_zh: 这位美国芯片制造商高管并未出现在早些时候参加唐纳德·特朗普总统本周访华的商界领袖名单中。

items.title: Trump is taking more than a dozen U.S. executives to China. Jensen Huang isn't one of them
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't going on Trump’s China trip, though more than a dozen other U.S. executives are.
items.title_zh: 特朗普将带十几名美国高管前往中国。黄仁勋不是其中之一
items.summary_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋不会参加特朗普的中国之行，但其他十几位美国高管却参加了。

items.title: Five things to watch in Asia as Trump prepares to meet China's Xi this week
items.summary: The U.S. and Chinese presidents are scheduled to gather in Beijing on Thursday and Friday amid a packed week of diplomatic meetings.
items.title_zh: 特朗普准备本周会见中国习近平，亚洲有五件事值得关注
items.summary_zh: 美国和中国国家主席定于周四和周五在北京举行为期一周的外交会议。

items.title: Series of court decisions weaken Democrats' odds of winning the House
items.summary: A U.S. Supreme Court decision and ruling from the Virginia Supreme Court have altered the redistricting outlook, hurting the chance that House control will flip.
items.title_zh: 一系列法院判决削弱了民主党赢得众议院的可能性
items.summary_zh: 美国最高法院的一项决定和弗吉尼亚州最高法院的裁决改变了选区重新划分的前景，损害了众议院控制权翻转的机会。

items.title: Michael Burry is not a believer: 'For any stocks going parabolic reduce positions almost entirely'
items.summary: Michael Burry said investors should "reject greed" as enthusiasm around artificial intelligence and momentum-driven trades pushes valuations sharply higher.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 不相信：“对于任何呈抛物线走势的股票，头寸几乎都会减少”
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，投资者应该“拒绝贪婪”，因为对人工智能和动力驱动交易的热情推动估值大幅上涨。

items.title: How much further does this Teflon market have to go? Here's what traders say
items.summary: Traders on prediction markets platform Kalshi place a more than 50% chance that the S&P 500 crosses 8,000 in 2026.
items.title_zh: 特氟龙市场还有多远的路要走？这是贸易商的说法
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，标普 500 指数在 2026 年突破 8,000 点的可能性超过 50%。

items.title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
items.summary: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.
items.title_zh: 特朗普抵达中国与习近平进行高风险会谈，贸易、伊朗和台湾问题成为议程
items.summary_zh: 美国总统表示，他对习近平的第一个要求是“开放”中国，而北京方面预计将就台湾的地位向特朗普施压。

items.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
items.summary: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.
items.title_zh: 法院推翻亚历克斯·默多的谋杀定罪并下令重新审判
items.summary_zh: 法院已下令对 2021 年 6 月保罗·默多 (Paul Murdaugh) 和玛吉·默多 (Maggie Murdaugh) 被杀事件进行新的审判。

items.title: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation

items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的一项调查揭露了诈骗者如何发布陷入困境的狗的社交内容，以欺骗捐赠者捐款。

items.title: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact

items.title: What to know as Trump visits Xi in China

items.summary_zh: 特朗普抵达北京，这是自2017年以来美国领导人首次访问北京。

items.title: Lockdown in Philippine Senate after gunshots fired

items.title: The Lecturer and Philosopher King: Xi Jinping Behind Closed Doors

items.title: Britain Has Had 5 Leaders in a Decade. Is It About to Get Another?
items.summary: The promise of Keir Starmer’s Labour Party in 2024 was renewed stability — but that now appears to be under threat.

items.title: Are These the Bones of the Fourth Musketeer? This Dutch Village Hopes So.
items.summary: Wolder, near the Belgian border, is waiting to see if the skeleton it dug up in a church is Count d’Artagnan, from Alexandre Dumas’s tale.
items.title_zh: 这些是第四个火枪手的骨头吗？这个荷兰村庄希望如此。

items.title: A Tech Tycoon’s Prosecution Raises Fears of Authoritarian Overreach
items.summary: Nadiem Makarim founded a popular app before joining Indonesia’s government. Now he could face 18 years in prison, targeted in what critics call a dubious anticorruption campaign.
items.title_zh: 科技大亨被起诉引发人们对独裁过度的担忧

items.title: Chaos in Philippines Senate as Duterte Ally Faces Arrest
